evals.prompt: Write 5 Meta ad variations for our project management tool targeting marketing managers at companies of 50-200 people.
evals.expected_output: Should load product-marketing-context.md. Should produce 5 variations testing different angles (at minimum: pain, outcome, social proof, time savings, and one more). Each variation should have: primary text with a hook in the first sentence, a headline, and a description. Should note which angle each variation is testing.
assertions: Each has primary text, headline, and description
First sentence of primary text is a hook
Notes the angle being tested for each
